301 I4500_STRK_CD I4500_STRK_CD I4500 Active Diagnoses: Stroke (CVA or TIA or Stroke) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of cerebrovascular accident (CVA), transient ischemic attack (TIA) or stroke in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
